title: Absolute + relative disparity + index of disparity across dimensions (reference-group policy)
context: Building on the age-standardized rates (disparities-analysis-rates-009), this task computes the full disparity measure set: absolute (rate difference) and relative (rate ratio) disparity for every race/ethnicity, sex, geography, and area-SES stratum, plus the HD*Calc measure set (Index of Disparity, SII, RII with CIs). The bounded intersectionality posture is applied: intersectional cuts the data supports at acceptable suppression are reported, and cuts that suppression forces out are explicitly disclosed. Every statement carries an 'adjusted-for / not-adjusted-for' note and per-group direction-of-bias documentation. Depends on: disparities-analysis-rates-009.
objective: Implement the disparity computation module: for every disparity statement output both a rate difference AND a rate ratio (never relative-only); compute the HD*Calc measure set (Index of Disparity, SII, RII with CIs) across all groups and validate outputs against HD*Calc on the exemplar site; apply the bounded intersectionality posture (report intersectional cuts the data supports at acceptable suppression; explicitly disclose cuts suppression forces out); attach a one-line 'adjusted for / not adjusted for' note to every disparity statement; enforce the reference-group policy (no group silently coded as 'normal'; reference explicitly stated); document race/ethnicity misclassification caveats with a per-group direction-of-bias note.
acceptanceCriteria: Computes both absolute (rate difference) and relative (rate ratio) disparity for every stratum in the data cube; no disparity statement is reported with only a rate ratio

Computes the HD*Calc measure set — Index of Disparity, SII, and RII with CIs — across all race/ethnicity groups and validates the outputs against an independent HD*Calc run on the exemplar site (results match within documented tolerance)

Applies the bounded intersectionality posture: computes intersectional cuts (e.g. race x sex x geography) the data supports at acceptable suppression and explicitly records which intersectional cuts suppression forced out rather than silently omitting them
Attaches a one-line 'adjusted for / not adjusted for' note to every disparity output (e.g. 'age-standardized; not adjusted for stage, comorbidity, or insurance')
Enforces the reference-group policy: the reference group for every disparity statement is explicitly declared in the output; no group is implicitly coded as the comparison baseline without disclosure
Documents race/ethnicity misclassification caveats with a per-group direction-of-bias note (e.g. AIAN/API/Hispanic incidence/mortality underestimated per CDC/USCS notes) attached to relevant outputs
Methods reviewer and framing reviewer sign-off recorded confirming disparity measures, HD*Calc validation, intersectionality posture, and reference-group policy are correct
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass
output: A merged PR adding the disparity computation module with absolute + relative disparity, HD*Calc measure set (validated), bounded intersectionality posture, 'adjusted-for' notes, reference-group policy enforcement, and direction-of-bias documentation, with methods and framing reviewer sign-off recorded.
